title: Dimlight
overview: Tears hidden behind laughter, a quiet love tucked between family quarrels, and the struggle of a comedian trying to survive a life that is anything but humorous. In a joyless household, and enchanted by an unfamiliar woman, Shamsuzzaman finds himself lost as a duel between comedy and crisis begins in his life.
